title: TLOTD
description: Explore the ancient times, when dinosaurs ruled the earth, dig deep into the earth to find more valuables or adventure into the unknown depths of space! The sky is the limit!
body:
![Update Logo](https://tlotd.net/minecraft/mod/update-0.4.2.png)

*"Explore the ancient times, when dinosaurs ruled the earth, dig deep into the earth to find more valuables or adventure into the unknown depths of space! The sky is the limit!"*

# About

[![TLOTD Icon](https://tlotd.net/minecraft/mod/tlotd-made.png)](https://tlotd.net)
[![Isla_Nublar Icon](https://tlotd.net/minecraft/mod/isla_nublar_made.png)](https://isla-nublar.com)

TLOTD focuses on allowing the player to explore new worlds, strive for weapons, tools and armor far stronger than the base game. In addition it also adds a variety of decorative items and refrences to other media. It's a rather exploration centric decor mod, which just happens to expanded the vanilla progression system with 5 brand new tool tiers: Heliorite & Endurium, Palladium & Jurassoline, Cinnabar & Nebular, Mithril and Astral. It also adds a new dimension called the prehistoric lands, a technic expansion featuring elevators, circuitry, computers, radio, television, keycards and teleporters. New crafting stations: the mithril anvil & the witching table. A key part of the mod is its interoperability and compatibility with other mods, such as The Aether, The Twilight Forest, Create, Alex's Caves, Farmer's Delight, Tough As Nails or Better Combat just to name a few.

| **0.3.0+** | [![Forge Button](https://tlotd.net/minecraft/mod/forge.svg)](https://files.minecraftforge.net) | [![Forgified Fabric API Button](https://tlotd.net/minecraft/mod/forgified_fabric_api.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api) | **⚠️ [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) Required** |

| **0.3.0+** | [![NeoForge Button](https://tlotd.net/minecraft/mod/neoforge.png)](https://neoforged.net) | [![Forgified Fabric API Button](https://tlotd.net/minecraft/mod/forgified_fabric_api.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api) | **⚠️ [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) Required** |

## Q & A
Q: Is this project open source?
A: Yes the full source code is available over on Github.

Q: Am I allowed to include this mod in my modpack?
A: Sure, just credit it somewhere.

Q: The Mod is not available in my native language, what can I do?
A: You could help the Project by providing a translation over on Github.

## Wiki

Also I made a wiki thingy for the mod, come check it out if you want to:
- [![TLOTD Wiki](https://tlotd.net/wiki/mc-mod/assets/guidebook.png) TLOTD Wiki](https://tlotd.net/wiki/mc-mod/)

| --- | --- | --- | --- |

| [![Roads 'n' Vehicles Logo](https://tlotd.net/wiki/mc-mod/assets/roads-n-vehicles.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/roads-n-vehicles) | **[Roads 'n' Vehicles](https://modrinth.com/mod/roads-n-vehicles)** | **Mod** | _Adds mostly street decorations aswell as a few cars. With TLOTD installed it also adds its own VHS Cassette and Game Cartridge._ |

With TLOTD installed it also adds its own VHS Cassette._ |
| [![Bare Bones x TLOTD Logo](https://tlotd.net/wiki/mc-mod/assets/bare-bones.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-tlotd) | **[Bare Bones x TLOTD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-tlotd)** | **Resourcepack** | _Makes TLOTD fit in with the Bare Bones trailer like style._ |
